_publications._publicationTitle: Machine Learning of Allosteric Effects: The Analysis of Ligand-Induced Dynamics to Predict Functional Effects in TRAP1.

_contextSnippet: In spite of the 24–27% loss in the specificity of SVM models, 68–69% of inhibitor-free trajectories can be genuinely recovered as TN.
details: External validation showed 24-27% loss in specificity for SVM models but maintained 68-69% recognition of inhibitor-free trajectories as true negatives
